user_query: Father likes eggs for breakfast. Add a classic egg based breakfast option for him on the day with the Smoky Base Pork Dinner

fields.name: Classic Scrambled Eggs with Sautéed Tomatoes & Whole-Grain Toast
fields.short_description: Fluffy scrambled eggs served with lightly sautéed cherry tomatoes and whole-grain toast — a simple, protein-forward, classic breakfast.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk 2–3 eggs with a splash of milk, salt, and pepper. Melt a small knob of butter or a teaspoon of olive oil in a nonstick pan over medium heat, pour in eggs and gently stir until just set for soft, creamy curds. In a separate skillet, sauté halved cherry tomatoes with a pinch of salt and a squeeze of lemon until warm and slightly softened. Serve eggs alongside 1–2 slices of toasted whole-grain bread; top with the warm tomatoes and a sprinkle of chopped chives or parsley. Optional: add a thin slice of smoked turkey or a small smear of avocado for extra protein or healthy fat.
fields.nutrition_note: Provides high-quality protein from eggs to support satiety and morning energy; whole-grain toast supplies complex carbohydrates and fiber; tomatoes add vitamin C and antioxidants. Optional additions (turkey or avocado) increase protein or healthy fats to match higher protein needs.

result.reasoning: Added to Father's Day 6 breakfast (the day with 'Smoky' items) to provide a classic, egg-forward option that complements the existing protein-packed breakfast choices and aligns with Father's preference for eggs. Appended at end to sit alongside current wrap variations.
